signIn.title: Sign in to your account
signIn.subtitle: Welcome back! Please sign in to continue.
signIn.googleError: Unable to sign in with Google.
signIn.emailNotConfirmed: Please verify your email before signing in. Use the link we emailed you, or resend it below.
signIn.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.
signIn.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase auth is not configured yet. Add environment values to continue.
signIn.resendSuccess: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.subtitle: Enter your details to get started.
signUp.name: Display name
signUp.googleError: Unable to sign in with Google.
signUp.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
signUp.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.
signUp.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase auth is not configured yet. Add environment values to continue.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: A password-reset link was sent to {{sentTo}}. Check your inbox.
forgotPassword.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase auth is not configured yet. Add environment values to continue.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Open the link to activate your account.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Verification email resent. Check your inbox.
verifyEmail.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.

callback.notConfiguredDescription: Add your real Supabase URL and key before testing sign-in.
callback.verifiedBody: Your email is confirmed. You can continue to the app.
callback.missingDataDescription: Open this screen from an email or OAuth sign-in redirect rather than navigating to it directly.
callback.timeout: Authentication took too long. Please try opening the link again.

landing.title: Selftend
landing.subtitle: Calm, guided self-help tools for reflection and emotional support.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 12 characters.
validation.passwordMin12Hint: Use at least 12 characters. Avoid common or breached passwords.
validation.passwordBreached: This password appears in known data breaches. Please pick a different one.
